species: Iqcn‐knockout mice were generated by CRISPR‐Cas9 technology
cell_type: we performed immunostaining analysis of IQCN and α‐tubulin of manchette microtubules in the testis and found that IQCN was expressed in elongating spermatids
disease_state: IQCN is essential for manchette assembly in elongating spermatids
sample_source: We recruited 42 infertile men from the Reproductive and Genetic Hospital...
age: Three sexually mature WT and Iqcn −/− male mice (8–10 weeks, n = 3)...
cell_line: we performed IQCN (WT, M1, and M2) and CALM3 transfection in HeLa cells.
sex: homozygous variants in IQCN were identified in two male patients experiencing TFF.
